creator: egypcio@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 190508
[PATCH] www/wml: The WML, 2.0.12

% svn copy -r437070 https://svn.freebsd.org/ports/head/www/wml@437070 www/wml

Changed MASTER_SITES and PORTREVISION;
Removed BROKEN and MOVED references.

There are websites still using WML, torproject.org is one of them.
